name: run_tests
description: Run tests for any language/framework with auto-detection, --summary/--brief for compact output, --failed for failure-only output, --tail=N for output length limit, --yarn for yarn scripts, --xvfbrun for E2E tests, --tz for timezone, --dir for changing directory, --env/--env-file for env vars (replaces export KEY=val chains), auto-sets Go environment (PATH, GOPATH, CGO_ENABLED=0) for --go mode, and auto-filters noisy timestamp-warning lines from Go output.

parameters.name: --go|--pytest|--vitest|--jest|--utscapy|--yarn
parameters.description: Force framework and specify test target; --yarn runs a yarn script (e.g., test-packages)

parameters.name: --grep
parameters.description: Filter tests by name pattern or grep UTscapy output

parameters.name: --env-file=PATH
parameters.description: Load env vars from file (KEY=val lines)

parameters.name: --summary|--compact
parameters.description: Show only test summary lines (PASS/FAIL counts)

parameters.name: --failed
parameters.description: Show only failure output with error details (all frameworks)

parameters.name: --passed
parameters.description: UTscapy: show only passed test lines

parameters.name: --dir=DIR
parameters.description: Change to DIR before running tests

parameters.name: --xvfbrun
parameters.description: Wrap with xvfb-run -a and set HEADLESS=true for E2E browser tests

parameters.name: --tail=N
parameters.description: Limit output to N lines (like piping through tail -N)
Pass remaining args through to test runner

parameters.name: --brief
parameters.description: Strip sub-describe headers from jest/vitest verbose output, keeping test lines and section headers

parameters.name: --no-coverage
parameters.description: Disable test coverage collection (passed through to jest/vitest/pytest)

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces verbose cd + export + python -m pytest with one invocation; --utscapy eliminates 150+ chars of -K flags and adds -f text -N for compact output; --yarn replaces cd + yarn test-packages ... | tail -N patterns with one step, saving 2 steps per test run; --xvfbrun replaces HEADLESS=true xvfb-run -a npx jest ... patterns seen in E2E samples, collapsing multi-variable setup into one flag; --tz replaces TZ=UTC prefix; --failed/--passed replaces post-hoc grep pipelines; --summary saves a post-hoc grep; --tail=N replaces manual | tail -N piping; --env-file replaces 20+ export statements with a single flag; --dir eliminates separate cd steps; --go auto-sets PATH/GOPATH/CGO_ENABLED=0, eliminating repeated export PATH=... boilerplate seen in samples, saving hundreds of token chars per invocation; Go mode auto-filters noisy timestamp-warning lines (time=... level=warning) reducing observation size by dozens of lines per run.
